🛒 While the balance of Amazon Pay Balance, Amazon Shopping Voucher & Amazon Fresh Gift Cards is shown as one combined balance in the Amazon app, their system automatically chooses the correct balance as per the items in the cart ✅

👉 For example, Amazon Fresh Gift Card balance is automatically used if the items in the cart are grocery items or you are ordering from Amazon Fresh 🥦 (even for Amazon Now I think 🤔)

👉 For general Amazon shopping and third-party gift cards on Amazon 🛍️, Amazon Shopping Voucher balance is used.

👉 For bill payments, recharges, etc. 💡, Amazon Pay Balance is used.

✅ So, as long as the intended gift card balance is being used automatically, there is no issue 👍

items.title:
✈️ My Strategy for Air India Maharaja Club Bonus Miles Offer 🔥💳

👉 I’ve already registered for the Air India Maharaja Club bonus miles offer, but I have NOT yet transferred my ICICI Emeralde Private Metal (EPM) points.

📅 My plan is to transfer points only after my EPM statement gets generated. Why? Because ICICI EPM points are credited after statement generation, so this strategy allows even my May spends to qualify for the bonus transfer 🚀

⚠️ Important: Air India will give bonus miles only on the FIRST transfer from each partner during the offer period. So if you transfer even a small amount now, you may lose the chance to earn bonus miles on future transfers from the same partner during this promo ❌

💡 Effectively, with the 50% bonus, every spend done even now (till statement generation) will earn upto 27% Airmiles 😱:

💳 Every ₹100 spent before statement generation becomes 1.5x Air India Miles 😍

🎁 Gift cards purchased via iShop:
➡️ Effective return = ~27% in Air India Miles 😱🔥

🛍️ Regular spends:
➡️ Effective return = ~4.5% in Air India Miles 👌✨

💳 What about HDFC Infinia Points?

Infinia transfers to Air India at a 2:1 ratio. Even after the 50% bonus, you effectively get:
➡️ 1 Infinia Point = 0.75 Air India Mile

Personally, I don’t find this attractive 🤔

Why settle for 0.75 Air India Mile when Infinia Points can still be transferred at 1:1 ratios to excellent airline programs like:

✈️ Finnair Plus → then convert to Qatar or British Airways Avios
✈️ Flying Blue (Air France / KLM)
✈️ KrisFlyer (Singapore Airlines)
✈️ Lotusmiles (Vietnam Airlines)
🏨 Wyndham Rewards (some sweet spots)
❌Air Asia, Spicejet, Radisson and IHG even at 1:1 can be ignored

✅ And if not above, can simply use Infinia points as 1 Point = Rs.1 for flight, hotel, Tanishq and Apple products from SmsrtBuy

So for me, Infinia Points are far more valuable elsewhere 🌍💎

🤔 What’s your strategy for this Air India bonus miles offer? Mention in comments 👇👇

items.title:
Unbelievable reward for betting on an underdog 😍🥰😍🥰😍

👉Air India brought back its grand bonus airmiles offer
👉You can transfer your credit card reward points (and even Flipkart super-coins) to Air India Maharaja Club and can get upto 50% Bonus Airmiles 😱😱😱

🚀🚀🚀With around 1.7 Lacs points in my ICICI Emeralde Metal Private Credit Card (the UnderDog), I can streight away get roughly 2.5 Lacs Air India airmiles 🤭🤭🤭. 
This has increased the valueback on last 1-year purchases from 18% to 27% 😱.

👉The offer is Not applicable to Axis Bank and HSBC(India) Credit Cards. But most other banks like ICICI, HDFC, SBI Air India Card, Indusind Tiger, Jupiter, Kotak, even Flipkart Super Coins etc .are included for bonus offer

👉Most Important Things

1️⃣ Registration for the Offer is mendatary before initiating transfer. 

Offer Registration Link: https://www.airindia.com/in/en/maharaja-club/partner-offers/points-fest.html

2️⃣ Only First transfer from each of the partner banks or lifestyle brands like Flipkart Super Coins will earn bonus rewards.

So, for example in my case, first transfer from my ICICI EPM, Jupiter Edge+, Flipkart Super Coin etc will earn bonus rewards.

3️⃣ Maximum 2 Lacs bonus points per partner. Huge limit 👌👌👌

4️⃣ Offer Period: 1st May to 31st May 2024

👉Tip: I would wait for next statement generation in most of my credit cards before initiating transfers, so my current cycle reward points also get bonus miles. 

👉Infinia Points: I have 1.87 Lacs points in my Infinia. But not sure if I will transfer my Infinia points to Air India as even with bonus it will give 0.75 Air India Mile for 1 Infinia Point. 

Whats you plan ? Mention in comments 👇👇👇

Just completed a year with ICICI EPM Credit Card and here’s what it delivered 👇

⸻

👉 Earned whopping 1,90,448 points
💰 Worth ₹1,90,448 — fully usable to:
✈️ Book any domestic or international flight in next 3 years (100% payable using points)
💍 Buy Tanishq gift card worth ₹1.9 Lacs
🛫 Get 1.9 Lacs Maharaja Club airmiles (can fetch even more value)

⸻

(including surcharge paid on gift cards like Amazon & Flipkart)

📈 That’s ~15.6% return 😱😱😱😱😱

⸻

🏨 A fully paid 1-night stay in Taj Exotica Goa
✔️ Breakfast + 1 full meal for family of 3
💰 Worth ₹60K+

🎬 50% discount on movie tickets (8–9 times)

📱 Few thousand rupees saved via instant discounts on iPhone & other purchases

✈️ Got ₹3,000 × 2 EaseMyTrip vouchers
📍 Used for my stay in Hoi An, Vietnam

⸻

👉 Spends Breakdown:

🛒 Almost all spends done via iShop (except movie tickets)
🥇 More than half of the spend was on gold using gift cards
📈 Gold value itself has increased by ~35% from its purchase price - a double dip

बाकी खर्च 👇
🛍️ Grocery | 🍔 Food orders | 🚖 Cabs
✈️ Travel | 🏠 Society maintenance | 🛡️ Insurance
📦 Household purchases

👉 All essential spends, no overspending

⸻

👉 Final Thought:

📊 ~15.6% return on daily normal expenses + so many additional benefits

Still people say credit cards are bad…

✔️ Yes — if you don’t have financial discipline
✔️ Yes — if you don’t control your desires & expenses

👉 But if used properly, credit cards can be extremely rewarding 🚀

items.title:
Guys, looks like HDFC has dropped the ₹3L spend target (for Mar–Apr 2026) that was earlier given to me to continue with my Infinia Credit Card 🙌

And honestly, I appreciate this gesture. 👍 (I have not even spent Rs.2 Lacs in the given period till now.)

🤔 Not sure if this Mar–Apr spend target waiver is for everyone or selective  
👉 Do comment if you also received a similar email

👉Like many Infinia users, I was asked to spend ₹3L across March & April 2026, failing which the card was to be closed/downgraded.

📩 Now I’ve received an email confirming:
✅ This spend condition has been waived  
✅ My Infinia will continue till March 2027

However, post that, the original renewal conditions still remain:

👉 Spend ₹18L in FY 2026–27 OR  
👉 Maintain ₹50L in Savings/FD

And frankly, neither works for me:

❌ I don’t have ₹18L worth of spends to route via Infinia  
(And I’m definitely not increasing expenses just to keep a credit card)

❌ Parking ₹50L in Savings/FD doesn’t make sense  
(The opportunity cost is far higher than the card’s benefits)

So for now, I’ll continue enjoying the card till 2027 — and thereafter will move to another card if HDFC persists with these conditions.🤷‍♂️

RT by @spendwiselyx: 🚨 Important Update for HDFC Metal Credit Card Users 🚨

Guys, if you hold HDFC Metal credit cards and your add-on cards share the SAME card number as the primary card, take action before 15th May ⏳

👉 Post this date, card replacement charges are going up significantly 💸

⚠️ What’s the risk?
If your primary + add-on cards have the same number and you need a replacement (lost, damaged, upgrade, etc.):
➡️ You’ll be forced to replace ALL linked cards together
➡️ Cost = ₹4,130 (incl. GST) × number of cards 😳

That can quickly become a big, unnecessary expense!

✅ Simple Fix:
Call customer care 📞
➡️ Request separate card number for add-on cards
➡️ They will:
• Close existing add-on card
• Issue a new add-on card with a different number

💡 Why this matters:
Once numbers are separate, any future replacement will be only for the affected card, saving you thousands 💰

A small step today… can save you a lot later 👍

Hello Everyone👋

Today feels very special

On January 6, 2026, we launched our Consultancy Services with one simple intention: to genuinely help.

Today, on April 5, we complete those first 90 days

The Inner Circle: 7

Rewards Concierge: 12

First Paycheck Pack: 2

From helping choose the right credit card for a major purchase, to planning family vacations, to guiding someone to get their first credit card on first year of their job, we’ve had the privilege of being part of so many meaningful journeys.

We’ve always believed that knowledge should be accessible to everyone. That belief led to building @TechnoFino Community into one of the largest communities around banking, credit cards, and loyalty programs in India.

But we also understand that information can feel overwhelming. We’ve experienced it ourselves. And that’s exactly why this exists.

If you ever feel stuck, unsure about your next card, confused about how to maximize your rewards, or simply want clarity, we’re here to help you move forward with confidence.

You can explore and book your consultancy here:
https://technofino.in/packages/

Thank you for your trust. It means more than words can ever express 🙏

@SumantaTF @bhavyegoel @CenturionGuy1
